projectDescription: A premium SaaS clinical management platform for gynecology and obstetrics practices, built with TanStack Start, React, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS.
keyFeatures: Intelligent appointment scheduling with day/week/month/list views and real-time sync
Full electronic medical records (historias clínicas) with gynecological and obstetric data
Structured consultation forms covering vitals, physical exam, colposcopy, and obstetric control
Clinical notes with file attachments stored in Supabase Storage
Billing and collections management with multiple payment method support
Interactive PDF exports: medical record, full history, rest certificate, invoice, monthly report
Executive analytics dashboard with KPIs, income charts, and marketing channel breakdown
CRM module for WhatsApp bulk outreach and patient fidelization campaigns
Role-based access control (admin / doctor) enforced by Supabase Row Level Security
Dark mode support with persistent localStorage preference
SSR via TanStack Start + Nitro for fast initial page load
Prescription template management for reusable medication instructions
publicApiSurface: usePatients() — paginated patient list with search and status filter
usePatient(id) — single patient detail with full clinical profile
useCreatePatient() — create patient with duplicate name/document checks
useUpdatePatient() — update patient record with optimistic updates
useDeletePatient() — delete patient and invalidate related queries
useAppointments(filters?) — appointments with optional date/status/limit filters
useCreateAppointment() — schedule a new appointment
useUpdateAppointment() — update appointment status, price, or payment method
useConsultations(filters?) — all consultations with optional date range
usePatientConsultations(patientId) — consultations for a specific patient
useConsultationByAppointment(appointmentId) — single consultation linked to appointment
useCreateConsultation() — create consultation via create_consultation_rpc
useUpdateConsultation() — update consultation via update_consultation_rpc
usePrescriptionTemplates() — list reusable prescription templates
useCreatePrescriptionTemplate() — save a new template
useClinicalNotes(patientId) — clinical notes for a patient
useCreateClinicalNote() — create clinical note with file attachments
useDeleteClinicalNote() — delete note and associated Supabase Storage files
uploadClinicalAttachments(patientId, files) — upload files to clinical-attachments bucket
getAttachmentUrl(path) — generate a 30-minute signed URL for an attachment
useClinicInfo() — fetch clinic configuration record
useUpdateClinicInfo() — update clinic name, address, phone, RIF
useDoctors() — list profiles with doctor role
useMyProfile(userId) — fetch current user profile
useAllProfilesWithRoles() — all profiles with associated roles (admin only)
useToggleRole() — grant or revoke admin/doctor role from a user
useAuthSession() — reactive auth session and user state
useRoles() — fetch current user's roles from user_roles table
useIsAdmin() — boolean check for admin role
useTheme() — light/dark theme toggle with localStorage persistence
useRealtimeSync() — Supabase realtime channel subscription for live data sync
exportFichaMedica(patient, clinic, doctorMap, notes) — export patient medical card PDF
exportFullHistory(patient, visits, clinic, doctorMap) — export complete clinical history PDF
exportReposo(patient, clinic, doctorInfo, reason, days, start) — export rest certificate PDF
exportInvoice(appointment, clinic, doctorInfo) — export payment receipt PDF
requireSupabaseAuth — TanStack Start server middleware for Bearer token validation
